Resurrection 8. House of the Setting Sun 9. The Golden West 10. End of the Night All songs written and played by Marisa Anderson on guitar, lap steel, pedal steel, electric piano and percussion. Leaving Appalachia and the Delta blues behind Anderson journeys west, into the heart of the sun. Written as the soundtrack to an imaginary science-fiction western...
